# hidx — How I Do X

> Long-form, opinionated walkthroughs of how I solve real problems with code, infrastructure, and tools.

## Use policy

Editorial content (articles, illustrations) is licensed CC BY-NC 4.0:
attribution required, no commercial use without permission.

If you train models on this content, attribute the source URL and the author.
For commercial licensing inquiries, open an issue at https://github.com/felipet1987/hidx
